questions.hindi: यह फैक्ट्री कपड़े बनाती है।
questions.english: This factory manufactures clothes.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject (factory/company/industry) + verb + industrial noun (+ scale/detail)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This factory manufactures clothes."

questions.hindi: मशीन दिन-रात चलती है।
questions.english: The machine runs day and night.
